description: Composition Brown round neck dress made of blended fabric, is sleeveless and comes with an attached satin belt for enhanced styling Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean preferred Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Flat dry Cool iron on reverse This brown dress from femella is styled to become your new day-to-night staple. This versatile piece can be worn with opaque tights and block heels – try substituting the slim belt with a broad one. You can also wear this with a structured jacket, the slim belt, a box clutch and heels for a dressier occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
